en:
To @cz_binance and the night that was not written in Freedom of Money

Recently @cz_binance released a new book, Freedom of Money.In the chapter “Taiwan” he wrote a few words:

“As is customary, I saw the local Binance angel.Those were three particularly enthusiastic college students.They gave me a detailed introduction to the development of cryptocurrencies in Taiwan, which taught me a lot. ”

I was one of those three college students.

But let's be honest: I'm not actually a Binance Angel.

I would sit at that table that night because Joey, a friend of the community, sent me a message asking if I wanted to meet someone, and I was a Bitcoin OG who had been in the Bitcoin community in Taipei since 2013.My path is "Bitcoin researcher → was temporarily called to dinner by a friend and → happened to chat with CZ all night", not through any official referral program of Binance.The other two college students at the same table that night, who are the official Binance angels and who are not, eight years later, I still don't know.I only know one thing: I'm not.

But one thing I know for sure: I was one of the three “particularly enthusiastic college students” CZ wrote about in his book.That night, I also told him about the development of Taiwan's crypto development in detail together with two other people.

Only a few lines were used in the book, but that night, it was actually much more than literal. Eight years later, I want to add the story of that night back to the gap on this page.

I. A night of dual identity

That night eight years ago, I met a man in Xinyi District, Taipei who had just flown back from the United States and said he was "going to take a picture".The next day, he was on the cover of Forbes magazine.The headline: "Crypto Overlord."

And that night, I had two identities at the same time.

By day I was a master's student at Peking University and desperately wanted to finish my three-year degree in two years.By night I was a Bitcoin researcher who participated in Bitcoin Meetup and translated Mastering Bitcoin into Chinese in Taipei in 2013.

My thesis progress is in the library in Beijing; in the bars and cafes in Taipei, I and a group of bitcoin enthusiasts have been playing cards for ten years.For these two things, I frequently return between Taipei and Beijing.

And Taipei has never been as simple as "my hometown".It is the earliest, most open, and most enthusiastic node in the entire Chinese Bitcoin world.Back in 2013, when almost all Chinese people were still asking “What is Bitcoin?”, there was already a group of crazy people in Taipei who held monthly Meetups in bars, cafes, and even the living room of an engineer's house, dismantling every chapter of “Mastering Bitcoin” in Chinese.Taiwan left much earlier than the outside world had imagined.The island is on the timeline of the Chinese cryptocurrency and is one of the foremost origin points.

It is this kind of turning back, and it is also the special coordinates of Taiwan, that made me accidentally push a small gap in the history of Binance in the slightly hot Xinyi District night at the beginning of 2018, with the smell of the end of the Spring Festival.

II. "Want to meet someone?"

I can't remember what day it was.I only remember one thing.That was the night before Forbes' cover on CZ.

That evening, Joey, a community friend, sent me a message:

“Do you want to meet someone?” "Sure, when isn't it?"

I got in a car to Xinyi District and walked into GBA Brewery Restaurant in Xinyi, Taipei.

At the table are a few people: a female college student who was enthusiastically sprinting for Binance's referral code in the early days, a friend who researched miner chips, Joey, CZ's old friend Ted for many years, and then CZ himself.

Me, the female classmate, and the friend of the miner chip, all three were later recorded in the book by CZ, becoming the "three particularly enthusiastic college students" he wrote.But strictly speaking, I was the only one who did not have the official identity of "Binance Angel" that night.I was temporarily called to the dinner table by Joey as a Bitcoin OG and Bitcoin researcher.I thought I was just going to listen to a story told by a friend who flew in from the United States, only to discover that I had actually been pushed into a night that would later be written into a book.

III. A two-line conversation

Frankly, I had no idea who CZ was.

I casually asked him:

"Where are you from?" “From the United States.” "What are you going to do?" “Go take a picture.”

This is the end of the conversation.

A man who had just returned from a photo shoot in the United States sat in front of me and drank a beer.That was his first impression.

The next day, I saw the cover of Forbes on the news, and the whole person stood there.Originally called "taking a photo", it was this photo.It turned out that the guy who spoke slowly, calmly, and generally toasted me last night was him.

The so-called low-key is a man who has been selected as the cover of a global financial magazine, and there is not a hint that you need to recognize him when talking to you.He just said, “Go take a picture.”

This is the first lesson CZ taught me.People who are truly confident never have to prove themselves in conversation.

IV. A Bitcoin OG's bias against Binance

At that time, my understanding of Binance was actually very weak.

To be more frank: As an OG that was immersed in Bitcoin in 2013, I naturally kept a little distance from the newly emerged "altcoin exchange" of that era.The keywords in my worldview are UTXO, script, Lightning Network, channel economics, not coin issue, coin listing, or financing.

From 2013 to that night, the eyes of the entire industry were on the exchanges of “fiat ⇄ cryptocurrencies”.

Taiwan has Yes BTC, BTCEX (which later collapsed), as well as Bito and MaiCoin, which are still operating today.These Taiwanese exchanges are actually the first ones in the Chinese-speaking world.In the era when many Chinese users do not know how to buy coins, Taiwanese users already have a relatively complete fiat currency deposit channel, KYC, customer service, and Chinese community can ask questions.This is an underappreciated contribution from Taiwan's early years in the cryptocurrency world: it ran the first batch of compliant exchange experiments for the entire Chinese-speaking community.Internationally, we have Poloniex, commonly known as "P Network", BTC-e, which was later seized by the United States, and OKCoin, Huobi, Bitcoin China... everyone is robbing the entrance of "fiat currency entry".

And in the gaps of this generation, an exchange called “Binance” emerged.The official website is cluttered, full of ads, and it seems that it is not trustworthy at all.But it did the right thing in a very counterintuitive way:

Position yourself as a “currency exchange.”

This is an anomalous choice.Because currency exchanges do not have fiat entrances, they sound more boring and difficult to market.But it comes in exchange for two things:

One, bypassing the regulation of banking systems in almost all countries. Two, it has to grow up with one thing, and that's USDT.

It's a beautiful cause.It makes the foundation of Binance, from the first day, not a traditional exchange, but a stablecoin native exchange.This seemingly insignificant positioning decision later proved to be the first cornerstone of the entire Binance Empire.

Binance = Bitcoin Finance, which is also "currency is safe". That night I felt: the name was so beautiful, so beautiful that a Bitcoin OG who was still defensive at the time was willing to sit down and listen to it.

V. One million TPS, and a 100-page paper

What we really spent the most time talking about that night was a chain.

As a technologist and a Bitcoin researcher, I can't help but ask:

"CZ, what are you going to do next?"

He talked to me about himself before he answered the question.He said that the one thing he was really doing along the way was to build a trading system.The more extreme, the faster, the more constantly polished.From the first day he entered the industry, he had an almost paranoid pursuit of "speed": speed up the matching engine, lower the delay, and increase the throughput.This is not a new ambition, it is a different version of the same thing he has repeatedly done for more than a decade.

Then he said that: He wants to build a blockchain that can achieve 1 million TPS, which is born for decentralized exchanges.

It was 2018.Ethereum is still pursuing the era of dozens or hundreds of TPS, and the consensus of the entire industry is that "blockchain can not achieve high TPS".And CZ said to a Bitcoin OG he had just known for 10 minutes at a table in Xinyi District, Taipei: 1 million.

My first reaction was, “This number is a bit ridiculous.”

But then I realized one thing: the words coming out of his mouth were not the same thing as the words coming out of other people's mouths.From the mouth of a CEO, that is to draw a big pie; but from the mouth of a person who has played the trading system for most of his life and regarded "the more extreme the faster" as a professional belief, that is an engineering goal.For him, 1 million TPS is not a dream, it is the next version.

Then what he said next completely stopped me from refuting the idea. He said:

“If Turing Completion is a bottleneck, then don't Turing Completion.As long as you can issue coins, list coins, and run a DEX, that's enough. ”

This has stayed in my head ever since.

It's not just a technical decision, it's a trade-off philosophy.For the sake of what really matters, give up all other unimportant things.

In 2018, the idea was almost heretical.Because everyone was looking for “smarter smart contracts,” no one was looking for “less smart contracts.”However, from the perspective of an exchange CEO, CZ saw something that engineers can't see: not all users need Turing to be complete.Most people only need three verbs: issue, list, and swap.

He threw me a project called Komodo.I went home and looked at it, wow, a hundred pages of thesis, some of it had to be eaten.But this is the researcher's daily routine.During those weeks, I kept a question in my head:

“Should I take a gamble and go to Binance?”

In the end, I chose to stay in Peking University.My heart's calculation is simple: Peking University's degree is forever, but Binance, I don't even know if it will be there next year.Over the past few years, I have watched too many exchanges and families collapse.

Looking back on today in 2026, this judgment... is indeed a little modest.😂

VI. "Insight": what stayed with me from that night

What stayed with me from that night was not technology—it was him.

CZ is a very calm, philosophical person who sees the future clearly.

He speaks with clean logic.The cause-and-effect relationship is clear.What is important, what is not important, what is the right direction, what is wrong, he has polished over and over again.He wasn't in a hurry to show, he was thinking.

A word he said to me is still in my ears to this day:

"Poor English?Just listen to an audiobook every day.Simple, clean, and continuous. ”

In terms of time management, 15 minutes, 30 minutes, the meeting is 15 minutes, 30 minutes, accurate to almost discipline.You can't fool a minute's delay from his conversation.

That night, we talked all the way from technology to philosophy, and even to high-dimensional space.The fifth degree is still six degrees, I can't remember it, but it is a conversation about "dimension", "essence", "the limit of simplification".In 2018, at a beer restaurant in Xinyi District, a Bitcoin OG and the CEO of an exchange who had just finished shooting the cover of Forbes enjoyed drinking and talking in the early morning, not about the market, not about financing, but about the universe in a geometric sense.Looking back now, the choice of this topic is a personality test in itself.A person who is really thinking about long-term issues will use late-night time to talk about dimensions, not prices.

I have always believed that philosophy is what brings people to the highest level.

Empirical → solutions → sublimated into reusable principles.

This cumulative process, I would call it "enlightenment."

Insight is not intelligence, it is not talent, it is not knowledge.Understanding is the cycle of "growing abstract principles from concrete things and then applying abstract principles back to more concrete things".This is a watershed where one can truly reach the highest level.

CZ, is a very enlightened person.

When I left that night, I realized that what I had just seen was not an exchange CEO, but a person who operated his life as a sustainable and iterative system.Each of his habits (listening to audiobooks, 15-minute meetings, reducing Dex to “send, go, change”) are different applications that have grown out of the same operating system.

VII. 2018 → 2026: direction validated

A few months later, Binance Chain was launched, based on Cosmos. Later, the Binance smart chain and double chain structure appeared, all the way to today's latest generation.

That night, I was focused on “Chain,” and he was focused on “Decentralized Exchanges.”

And in 2026, what is the hottest thing in the market?

It's DEX.

Trading volumes, liquidity, and trust that have been locked up in centralized exchanges are migrating to the chain layer by layer.One of the earliest whistleblowers of this trend was the man who had "just gone to the US to take photos" on the table in Xinyi District, Taipei in 2018.

He sees the right direction, and he has the courage to move forward.

The first edition is ordinary, and the second edition is polished. The second edition is good enough, continue to simplify.

That's him.This is Binance.

VIII. Why Taiwan?

At this point, I want to stop and ask: Why did CZ finish the cover of Forbes from the United States, and the first stop was Taipei?

I thought about it for a long time, and the answer is probably four things happening on this island at the same time.

Semiconductor genes. Taiwan is one of the most chip-aware islands in the world, and TSMC and MediaTek are here.When the tide of mining machines swept through the Chinese language circle, Taiwan was never a simple buyer, but a designer.It was no coincidence that the friend who sat next to me that night was working on the miner chip.

Free Information Port. No firewall, no keyword filtering.In 2013, I translated the Chinese version of "Mastering Bitcoin" in Taipei, which was later converted into simplified Chinese by the whole Chinese world, read it, and taught it to the next person.The translators in Taipei are Chinese speakers from all over the world.

Hackers and community culture. g0v, COSCUP, Taipei Bitcoin Meetup, the way Taiwanese start a community is "because it's fun to do it", without KPIs, a gathering is years.This chair is hard to replicate, but this is what CZ sat on that night.

The international interface of the Mandarin-speaking world. Taiwan also has a deep Chinese context and a completely open mind to the world.In the CZ book, "Because of the common language, Binance's market share in Taiwan is also quite good", this sentence is only half written.The other half is: Taiwan is one of the few places in the Chinese-speaking world where you can talk to both the Chinese and English circles at the same time.For a CEO heading from Asia to the world, this is a natural first stop.

Put these four lines on top of each other, and you will understand why that night happened in Taiwan.

At that table, not only five people and a CZ were sitting, but the earliest and deepest node in the entire Chinese Bitcoin world.

That was the weight of the night.

IX. A thread through Xinyi District

There is actually a very warm little story about why I had the chance to meet CZ, and the story itself hides a Taiwanese line.

When CZ was studying in Canada, he had a very good Taiwanese classmate named Ted.The Ted family was one of the families that invested in immigrating to Canada from Taiwan in the late 1990s and early 2000s.That entire generation of Taiwanese sent their children to study in the English-speaking world, allowing them to learn calculus, make friends, and bring the identity of "Taiwan" into every dormitory, laboratory, and entrepreneurial circle they entered in the winter of Maple Leaf Country.Ted is one of an entire generation of Taiwanese children.

So, when this Taiwanese boy who grew up in Toronto met a Chinese classmate named CZ, he handed over his Taiwanese roots to this friend.Many years later, when CZ needed to visit Asia, his first thought was not Shanghai, not Hong Kong, not Singapore, but the home of his old Taiwanese classmate Ted.

This line was pulled from the era of Taiwanese investment immigrants. It passed through the campus of Toronto, through more than a decade of friendship, through Joey, through a beer restaurant in Xinyi District, and finally in front of my unfinished beer.

From campuses in Canada, to beer tables in Taipei's Xinyi District.This line circled halfway around the globe in time and space, and that night, it was the last step in front of my eyes.

Sometimes you think you're just a spectator of fate, only to discover later that you're actually a node of fate.And this node exists because an entire generation of Taiwanese has sprinkled their children, knowledge, enthusiasm and goodwill into every corner of the world.

X. Eight years later—what I do now

Eight years.

Thank you @cz_binance for remembering those three enthusiastic college students who were willing to write that night into Freedom of Money.

That night you taught me much more than I realized at the time: the courage to look in the direction, the simplicity of discipline, the philosophy of calmness, and the phrase that never expires:

“Just listen to an audiobook every day.”

That night, we had a serious discussion at the dinner table: a chain that was born for Dex and had to grow up with USDT.

You went your way: Binance chain, BSC, decentralized exchanges, all the way to 2026 when Dex became the hottest place in the market.

And I walked into another branch.

Today I'm working on an open source protocol called t402.It allows any webpage endpoint to return HTTP 402 Payment Required, lets the client sign a USDT authorization, facilitator settles within three seconds on the chain, and there is no agreement fee.Supports 47 networks, 13 blockchain families, ERC-4337 gasless transactions, and automated payments for AI agents.

In a nutshell:

Eight years ago that night you were discussing with me: “What kind of chain does Dex need?”

And what I'm doing today is: “What kind of USDT payment track does the entire network need?”

Write stablecoin into the bottom layer of HTTP, so that every request in the era of AI agents can be automatically paid in three seconds.

Different directions, same genes. Both: Start with stablecoin, then simplify.

The Bitcoin OG who didn't know who you were then slowly read you. Now, in his own way, he was continuing to write what he had learned that night.

XI. To those at the table—and to the island

I would also like to say to Joey and Ted at the same table, the female classmate who was enthusiastic about the Binance referral code at that time, and the friend who researched the miner chip:

We witnessed the beginning of an era together that night.

I would also like to say thank you to Taiwan.

Thanks to this island, I have had the opportunity to immerse myself in a mature Bitcoin community since 2013; thanks to this island, the technical literature in Traditional Chinese can be freely translated, freely circulated, and freely served to the entire Chinese-speaking world; thanks to this island, I am willing to vacate a table in Xinyi District in 2018, so that a CEO who has just returned from the cover of Forbes can sit down and talk to a group of college students about 1 million TPS; thanks to the island's semiconductor genes, community culture, bilingual ability, and pure enthusiasm of "doing it because it's fun".

Without this island, there would be no night. I couldn't have written this article today without that night.

Cheers.🥂 To Taiwan, the island that will always be at the forefront of the Chinese Bitcoin world.

About the author

Dr. Awesome Doge · @drawesomedoge

Bitcoin OG since 2013.Taipei Bitcoin Meetup.The largest Bitcoin community in Asia.Traditional Chinese translators of more than a dozen blockchain technical documents such as Mastering Bitcoin, Programming Bitcoin, Mastering the Lightning Network, and The Blocksize War.Study covers UTXO scripting, Lightning channel economics, RGB client-side validation.

Now building t402, an open source protocol that allows the entire network to natively pay USDT, laying the HTTP-native payment track for the era of AI agents.

#Binance #币安人生 # CZ # t402 # Bitcoin # Web3 # HTTP402 # Stablecoin
ko:
@cz_binance 와 《币安人生》에 쓰이지 않은 그 밤에게

최근 @cz_binance 가 신간 《币安人生》을 냈습니다. 「台湾」 장에서 짧게 썼습니다:

「관례대로 현지 币安天使를 만났다. 특히 열정적인 대학생 세 명. 대만 암호화폐 발전 현황을 자세히 소개해 주어 많이 배웠다.」

저는 그 세 대학생 중 한 명입니다.

솔직히 말하면: 저는 사실 币安天使가 아닙니다.

그날 밤 그 테이블에 앉은 이유는 커뮤니티 친구 Joey가 「사람 한 명 만날래?」라고 물었고, 저는 2013년부터 타이베이 비트코인 커뮤니티에 있던 Bitcoin OG였기 때문입니다. 경로는 「비트코인 연구员 → 친구가 임시로 밥 먹자 → CZ와 밤새 대화」였지, 币安 공식 추천 프로그램이 아니었습니다. 같은 테이블의 다른 두 대학생 중 누가 공식 币安天使인지, 8년이 지나도 모릅니다. 저만은 아닙니다.

하지만 확실한 것: 저는 CZ가 책에 쓴 「특히 열정적인 대학생」 셋 중 하나입니다. 그날 밤 저도 두 사람과 함께 대만 암호화폐 현황을 하나하나 이야기했습니다.

책에는 몇 줄뿐이지만, 그날 밤은 글자 그 이상이었습니다. 8년 후, 그날 밤 이야기를 이 페이지 틈에 다시 써 넣고 싶습니다.

一、이중 정체성의 하룻밤

8년 전 그날 밤, 타이베이 신의구에서 미국에서 막 돌아와 「사진 찍으러 갔다」고 한 남자를 만났습니다. 다음 날 《포bes》 표지였습니다. 헤드라인: "Crypto Overlord".

그날 밤의 저는 두 정체성을 동시에 가졌습니다.

낮에는 北京大学 석사, 3년 학위를 2년에 끝내려 애썼습니다. 밤에는 2013년부터 타이베이 Bitcoin Meetup에 나가 《Mastering Bitcoin》 번역한 비트코인 연구员.

베이징 도서관에 논문 진도, 타이베이 바·카페에 10년째 이어진 비트코인狂들과의 자리. 두 일을 위해 타이베이와 베이징을 오갔습니다.

타이베이는 「고향」 이상입니다. 华语 비트코인 세계에서 가장 이르고 개방적이며 열정적인 노드. 2013년 대부분의 华人가 「비트코인이 뭐야?」라 물을 때, 타이베이는 이미 매달 바·카페·工程师 거실에서 《Mastering Bitcoin》을 한 줄씩 中文로 뜯어보는 meetup을 했습니다. 대만은 외부 상상보다 훨씬 이르게 갔습니다.

이러한 折返과 대만이라는 좌표가, 2018년 초 봄节余韵이 남은 신의구의 밤, 저를 币安 역사의 작은 틈으로 밀어 넣었습니다.

二、「사람 한 명 만날래?」

날짜는 기억 안 납니다. 하나만: CZ 《포bes》 표지 전날 밤.

저녁 Joey 메시지: 「사람 한 명 만날래?」 「그래, 안 갈 날이 있나.」

차 타고 신의구 GBA Brewery Restaurant.

테이블: 초기 币安 추천码 열심히 뛴 女大学生, 矿机芯片 연구 친구, Joey, CZ 오랜 친구 Ted, CZ.

저·여학생·矿机 친구 셋은 나중에 CZ 책의 「세 명의 열정적인 대학생」이 됐습니다. 엄밀히 저만 그날 「币安天使」 공식 신분이 없었습니다. Bitcoin OG·연구员으로 Joey가 임시로 불렀습니다. 미국에서 온 친구 이야기 들으러 간 줄 알았는데, 책에 쓰일 밤으로 밀려 들어갔습니다.

三、두 마디 대화

솔직히 CZ가 누군지 몰랐습니다.

「어디서 왔어?」 「미국.」 「뭐 하러?」 「사진 찍으러.」

대화 끝. 막 「사진 찍고」 돌아온 남자가 맥주 마시며 앉아 있었습니다.

다음 날 《포bes》 표지—멍. 「사진 찍으러」가 이 사진이었습니다. 어젯밤 천천히 조용히 건배한 그가 CZ.

低调이란, 글로벌 财经杂志 표지男이 당신을 알아보라는 힌트 없이 말하는 것. 「사진 찍으러 갔어.」

CZ가 가르친 첫 수업: 진짜 자신감 있는 사람은 대화에서 자신을 증명할 필요가 없다.

四、Bitcoin OG의 币安 편견

당시 币安 이해는 옅었습니다.

더 솔직히: 2013년부터 비트코인에 있던 OG로서, 그 시대 새 「山寨币交易所」와 거리를 뒀습니다. 세계관 키워드는 UTXO, script, Lightning, channel economics—not 发币·上币·融资.

2013년부터 그날까지 업계 시선은 「法币 ⇄ 加密」 거래소.

대만 Yes BTC, BTCEX(後倒), BITO, MaiCoin—华语圈 앞서간 一批. 华人 많은 지역이 买币 모를 때 대만은 法币入金·KYC·客服·中文社群. 华语圈 第一批合规化实验.

국제적으로 Poloniex「P网」, BTC-e, OKCoin, 火币, 币特币中国… 「法币入场」 쟁탈.

그 틈 「币安」—杂乱的官网, 广告, 不值得信任. 그러나 极反直觉地 맞춘 것:

「币币交易所」定位.

法币入口 없어 지루하고 마케팅 어렵지만, 두 가지: 1) 대부분 국가 银行体系监管 회피 2) USDT와 함께 성장해야.

아름다운 因缘. 币安地基은 첫날부터 传统交易所가 아니라 稳定币原生交易所. 看似不起眼—后来 币安帝国第一块奠基石.

Binance = Bitcoin Finance, 「币很安全」. 그날 밤: 이름이 예뻐서 防备心 있는 Bitcoin OG도 앉아 이야기 들을 만했다.

五、100万 TPS와 100页 论文

그날 밤 가장 오래 논의한 것: 一条链.

「CZ, 다음에 뭐 할 거야?」

답 전 자신 이야기: 一路走来做的是 交易系统. 越极致越快速, 不断打磨. 入行第一天부터 「速度」에 近乎偏执—撮合引擎更快, 延迟更低, 吞吐量更大. 新野心 아님, 十几年同一事的另一版本.

그리고: 100万 TPS 区块链, 为去中心化交易所而生.

2018. 以太坊 几十上百 TPS, 业界共识 「区块链不可能高 TPS」. CZ가 台北 신의구 餐桌上 刚认识10分钟的 Bitcoin OG에게: 100万.

첫 반응 「这个数字有点荒谬」. 그러나 CEO嘴와 打了大半辈子交易系统的人嘴는 다름. 前者画大饼, 后者工程目标. 100万 TPS는 梦想 아님 下一版本.

「如果图灵完备是瓶颈, 就不要图灵完备. 能发币、能上币、能跑 DEX 就够了.」

脳裡 一直留着. 技术决策이자 取舍哲学—为真正重要的事放弃其他.

2018 几乎异端. 人人追求更聪明智能合约, 没人追求更少. CZ从交易所CEO视角: 并非所有用户需要图灵完备. 绝大多数只需三动词: 发、上、换.

Komodo 项目 던짐. 回家一看 一百页论文. 研究员日常. 几周 「要不要赌一把去币安?」

결국 北大留下. 北大学位永远, 币安明年还在否 모름. 过去几年 交易所一家家倒.

2026 回头看… 确实谦虚了一点.😂

六、「悟性」: 那晚真正记住的

记住한 건 技术 아님  그 사람.

CZ 非常冷静、充满哲学、对未来看得很清楚. 逻辑干净, 因果清楚, 重要/不重要, 对/错方向 一遍遍打磨. 不急 show, 在想.

「英文不好? 每天听有声书就好. 简单, 干净, 持续做.」— 今も耳に.

时间管理 15分30分会议就是15分30分, 精准到纪律. 对话里 骗不到一分钟延时.

技术→哲学→高维空间. 五度六度记不清, 「维度」「本质」「化繁为简极限」. 2018 信义区啤酒餐厅 Bitcoin OG与刚拍完《福布斯》封面 CEO 凌晨 聊的不是行情融资而是几何学宇宙. 话题选择本身人格测验. 思考长期问题的人 深夜谈维度不谈价格.

哲学才带人最高境界. 经验→解决方案→升华成可复用原则. 这累积过程我叫 「悟性」. 悟性不是聪明才华知识, 是从具体长出抽象原则再应用回具体的循环. 能否走到最高境界分水岭.

CZ 非常有悟性. 离席时意识到见的不是交易所CEO, 而是把人生当可持续迭代系统经营的人. 每个习惯(有声书、15分会议、DEX降维成发上换)同一操作系统长出的应用.

七、2018→2026: 方向验证

数月后 币安链 Cosmos. 后 BSC 双链至今.

那晚我专注「链」, 他专注「去中心化交易所」.

2026 市场最火? DEX.

锁在中心化交易所的量、流动性、信任 一层层迁到链上. 最早吹哨人之一—2018 台北信义区餐桌 「刚去美国拍照」的男人.

看得见准确方向, 有勇气一直往前冲. 第一版普通就打磨第二版. 第二版够好就继续化繁为简. 这就是他. 这就是币安.

八、为什么是台湾?

CZ 美国拍完《福布斯》封面 第一站台北?

四件事同时在这岛: 半导体基因(TSMC联发科, 矿机潮台湾是设计者非买家, 同桌矿机芯片朋友非偶然). 自由信息港(无防火墙, 2013台北译《Mastering Bitcoin》繁中版 华语世界转简体读教). 骇客社群文化(g0v COSCUP 台北Bitcoin Meetup 「因为有趣就做」无KPI一聚好几年, CZ坐的就是这种椅子). 华语世界国际接口(中文语境+对世界完全开放, CZ书「语言相通市占不错」只写一半—台湾少数能同时对话中文圈英文圈, 从亚洲走向世界的CEO天然第一站).

四线叠起就明白为何那晚在台湾. 那桌不只是五人一CZ, 是整个华语比特币世界最早最深的节点. 那晚的重量.

九、穿过信义区的一条线

为何我有机会见CZ—温暖小故事, 藏台湾线.

CZ加拿大读书时 台湾同学Ted. Ted家1990末2000初 台湾投资移民加拿大. 整代台湾人送孩去英语世界—微积分交朋友把「台湾」带进宿舍实验室创业圈. Ted是那一代之一.

多伦多长大的台湾男孩遇华人同学CZ, 把台湾根交给朋友. 多年后CZ需来亚洲, 第一想到不是上海香港新加坡, 而是老同学Ted的家.

线从台湾投资移民年代拉—穿过多伦多校园十几年友情Joey信义区啤酒餐厅, 最后到我未喝完的啤酒前.

加拿大校园到台北信义啤酒桌. 线绕半个地球, 那晚在我眼前走完最后一步.

有时以为只是命运旁观者, 后来发现是命运节点. 节点存在因为整代台湾人把孩知识热情善意洒到世界每个角落.

十、八年后我在做的事

八年.

感谢 @cz_binance 还记得三位热情大学生, 愿把那晚写进《币安人生》.

那晚教的远比我当时意识到的多: 看方向勇气、化繁为简纪律、冷静哲学, 及永不过期 「每天听有声书就好」.

那晚餐桌认真讨论: 为DEX而生须与USDT一起长大的链.

你走币安链BSC DEX一路到2026 DEX最热.

我走另一支线.

今天做开源协议 t402—任何网页端点可回传 HTTP 402 Payment Required, 客户端 USDT签授权, facilitator链上三秒结算零协议费. 47网络13区块链家族 ERC-4337 gasless AI agent自动支付.

八年前那晚讨论:「DEX需要什么样的链?」
今天我做:「整个网络需要什么样的 USDT 支付轨道?」

stablecoin写进HTTP底层, AI agent时代每次请求三秒内自动付费.

方向不同基因一样: 从stablecoin出发化繁为简.

当年不知你是谁 Bitcoin OG 后来慢慢读懂. 现在用自己的方式继续写那晚学到的东西.

十一、给同桌与那座岛

也想对Joey Ted 当年为推荐码冲刺的女同学 矿机芯片朋友说:

我们那晚一起见证时代开端.

也想对台湾说谢谢.

谢谢这岛2013起成熟比特币社群; 谢谢繁中技术文献自由翻译流通服务华语世界; 谢谢2018愿空出信义区餐桌让刚拍完《福布斯》CEO与大学生聊100万TPS; 谢谢半导体基因社群文化双语能力「因为有趣就做」纯粹热情.

没有这岛就没有那晚. 没有那晚今天写不出这文.

乾杯.🥂 也敬台湾, 永远站在华语比特币世界最前线的小岛.

关于作者

Dr. Awesome Doge · @drawesomedoge

Bitcoin OG since 2013. 台北 Bitcoin Meetup. 亚洲最大比特币社群.《Mastering Bitcoin》《Programming Bitcoin》《Mastering the Lightning Network》《The Blocksize War》等十余部区块链文献繁中译者. 研究 UTXO scripting Lightning channel economics RGB client-side validation.

现在打造 t402—让整个网络都能原生支付 USDT 的开源协议, 为 AI agent 时代铺设 HTTP-native 支付轨道.

#Binance #币安人生 #CZ #t402 #Bitcoin #Web3 #HTTP402 #Stablecoin
ja:
@cz_binance と『币安人生』に書かれなかったあの夜へ

最近 @cz_binance が新刊『币安人生』を出した。「台湾」の章に短く書いている：

「慣例どおり地元の币安天使に会った。特に熱意ある大学生三人。台湾の暗号資産発展現状を詳しく紹介してくれ、多くを学んだ。」

私はその三人の大学生の一人。

ここで正直に：私は実は币安天使ではない。

あの夜テーブルに座ったのは、コミュニティのJoeyから「人に会わない？」とメッセージがあり、2013年から台北ビットコインコミュニティにいたBitcoin OGだったから。経路は「ビットコイン研究員→友に急に食事に呼ばれる→CZと一晩中語る」で、币安公式紹介プログラムではない。同席の他二人誰が正式币安天使か、8年後も不明。自分だけは違う。

しかし確かなこと：私はCZが書いた「特に熱意ある大学生」三人の一人。あの夜私も二人と台湾暗号資産現状を包み隠さず話した。

本は数行だが、あの夜は文字以上だった。8年後、その夜の物語をこのページの隙間に書き戻したい。

一、二重アイデンティティの一夜

8年前、台北信義区でアメリカから帰り「写真を撮りに行った」と言う男に会った。翌日『Forbes』表紙。見出し "Crypto Overlord".

あの夜の私は二つの身份を同時に持っていた。

昼は北京大学院生、3年学位を2年で終えようと必死。夜は2013年から台北Bitcoin Meetupに参加し『Mastering Bitcoin』を翻訳したビットコイン研究員。

北京の図書館に論文進度、台北のバー・カフェに10年続くビットコイン仲間との局。台北北京を頻繁に往復。

台北は「故郷」以上。華語ビットコイン世界で最も早く開放的で熱意あるノード。2013年ほとんどの華人が「ビットコインとは？」と聞く頃、台北は既に毎月バー・カフェ・エンジニアのリビングで『Mastering Bitcoin』を中文一行ずつ解体するMeetup。台湾は外界の想像よりずっと早かった。

この往復と台湾という座標が、2018年初め春節の余韻ある信義区の夜、私を币安史の小さな隙間へ押し込んだ。

二、「人に会わない？」

日付は覚えていない。一つだけ：CZ『Forbes』表紙の前夜。

夕方Joey：「人に会わない？」「いいよ、行かない日ある？」

車で信義区へ、GBA Brewery Restaurant。

テーブル：初期币安紹介コードに情熱的だった女子大生、矿机チップ研究の友、Joey、CZの旧友Ted、CZ本人。

私・女子・矿机友の三人は後にCZの「三人の熱意ある大学生」に。厳密に私だけがその夜「币安天使」正式身份なし。Bitcoin OG・研究員としてJoeyに呼ばれた。アメリカから来た友の話を聞きに行ったつもりが、後に本に書かれる夜へ。

三、二言の会話

正直CZが誰か知らなかった。

「どこから？」「アメリカ。」「何しに？」「写真撮りに。」

会話終了。アメリカ「写真撮り」帰りの男がビールを飲んでいた。

翌日ニュースの『Forbes』表紙—呆然。「写真撮り」がこの写真。昨夜ゆっくり冷静に乾杯した男がCZ。

所谓の低调とは、グローバル财经誌表紙男が、あなたに認知を促すヒントなく話すこと。「写真撮りに行った。」だけ。

CZが教えた第一課：本当に自信ある人は会話で自分を証明しない。

四、Bitcoin OGの币安への偏見

当時币安理解は薄かった。

より正直に：2013年からビットコインにいたOGとして、当時新興「アルトコイン取引所」と距離を置いていた。世界観のキーワードはUTXO、script、Lightning、channel economics—发币・上币・融资ではない。

2013年からその夜まで業界の目は「法币⇄暗号」取引所。

台湾Yes BTC、BTCEX（後に倒産）、BITO、MaiCoin—華語圏でも先頭グループ。多くの華人地域が买币を知らない時代、台湾は法币入金・KYC・客服・中文コミュニティ。華語圏最初の合规化実験。

国際的Poloniex「P网」、BTC-e、OKCoin、火币、币特币中国…「法币入場」争奪。

その世代の隙間に「币安」—官网杂乱、広告満載、信頼できなさそう。しかし极めて反直觉的に正しかったこと：

「币币取引所」定位。

法币入口なし、退屈でマーケ難しい。代わりに二つ：1) ほぼ全国の銀行体系規制回避 2) USDTと共に成長必須。

美しい因缘。币安の地基は初日から伝統取引所でなくステーブルコイン原生取引所。この seemingly 不起眼な定位が後に币安帝国第一の奠基石。

Binance = Bitcoin Finance、「币很安全」。あの夜：名が美しく、防备心あるBitcoin OGも座って話を聞く気になった。

五、100万TPSと100页論文

あの夜最も時間をかけたのは一条チェーン。

「CZ、次何する？」

答える前に自分の話：一路で本当にやってきたのは取引システム構築。越极致越快速、不断打磨。業界初日から「速度」への近乎偏执—撮合引擎を速く、遅延を低く、スループットを大きく。新野心ではなく十数年同じことの別バージョン。

そして：100万TPSのブロックチェーン、DEXのために。

2018。イーサリアムは数十・数百TPS、業界共识「区块链は高TPS不可能」。CZが台北信義の食卓で10分前に知ったBitcoin OGに：100万。

第一反応「この数字は少し荒谬」。しかしCEOの口からと、取引システムを大半人生打ってきた人の口からは別物。前者は大餅、後者は工程目標。100万TPSは夢ではなく次のバージョン。

「图灵完备がボトルネックなら、图灵完备にするな。发币・上币・DEXが走れば足りる。」

以来頭に残る。技術決定であり取舍哲学—本当に重要なことのため他を捨てる。

2018はほぼ異端。皆「より賢いスマートコントラクト」、誰も「より少ない」を求めない。CZは取引所CEO視点で：全ユーザーが图灵完备必要ではない。大多数は三動詞：发・上・換。

Komodoプロジェクトを投げられた。家で見ると100页論文。研究員の日常。数週「币安に賭ける？」

結局北大に残った。北大学位は永遠、币安が来年あるか不明。数年間取引所が次々倒れた。

2026今日振り返ると… 確かに謙虚すぎた.😂

六、「悟性」：あの夜本当に今日まで残ったもの

残ったのは技術ではなく彼。

CZは非常に冷静で哲学的、未来をよく見通す。論理がきれい、因果が明確、重要/非重要、正/誤方向を何度も磨く。急いでshowせず、考えている。

「英語がダメ？毎日オーディオブックを聞けばいい。シンプル、きれい、継続。」—今も耳に。

時間管理15分30分会議は15分30分、纪律に近い精度。会話から1分も延長を騙せない。

技術から哲学、高次元空間まで。五度か六度か忘れたが「次元」「本質」「化繁為简の極限」の対話。2018信義区ビールレストラン、Bitcoin OGとForbes表紙撮影直後の取引所CEOが未明、相場でも融资でもなく幾何学的宇宙。話題選択自体が人格テスト。長期問題を考える人は深夜に维度を語り価格を語らない。

哲学こそ人を最高境へ。経験→解決策→再利用可能原則へ昇華。この蓄積を「悟性」と呼ぶ。悟性は聡明でも才華でも知識でもなく、具体から抽象原則を生み再び具体に戻す循環。最高境へ行ける分水嶺。

CZは非常に悟性がある。離席時、見たのは取引所CEOではなく、人生を持続可能な反復システムとして運営する人。各習慣（オーディオブック、15分会議、DEXを发上換に降维）は同一OSから生まれたアプリ。

七、2018→2026：方向の検証

数ヶ月後币安チェーン Cosmos。後BSC二チェーン構造から今日最新世代へ。

あの夜私は「チェーン」、彼は「DEX」に集中。

2026市場で最も熱いのは？ DEX。

CEXに閉じ込められた取引量・流動性・信任が層をなしてチェーンへ。最早の whistleblower の一人—2018台北信義「アメリカで写真撮りに行ったばかり」の男。

正確な方向が見え、前へ進む勇気。第一版が普通なら第二版を磨く。第二版が良ければ化繁為简を続ける。それが彼。それが币安。

八、なぜ台湾？

CZがアメリカでForbes表紙撮影後、第一駅が台北？

この島で四つ同時：半導体基因（TSMC联发科、矿机潮で台湾は買い手でなく設計者、隣の矿机チップ友は偶然でない）。自由情報港（防火壁なし、2013台北で『Mastering Bitcoin』繁中版が華語世界に転簡体・読み・教え）。ハッカー・コミュニティ文化（g0v COSCUP 台北Bitcoin Meetup「面白いからやる」KPIなし数年集まる、CZが座ったのはその椅子）。華語世界の国際接口（中文語境＋世界への完全開放、CZの「言語相通で市占良好」は半分—台湾は中文圏と英文圏同時対話できる少数、アジアから世界へCEOの天然第一駅）。

四線を重ねればあの夜が台湾で起きた理由。テーブルには五人とCZだけでなく、華語ビットコイン世界最早最深のノード。あの夜の重さ。

九、信義区を貫く一本の線

なぜCZに会えたか—温かい小さな話、台湾の線を隠す。

CZカナダ留学時、台湾人クラスメートTed。Ted家は1990年代末2000年代初の台湾投資移民カナダ。整代台湾人が子を英語世界へ—微積分、友達、「台湾」身份を寮・実験室・創業圏へ。Tedはその一代の一人。

トロント育ち台湾少年がCZと出会い、台湾の根を友に。年後CZがアジアを見に来る時、最初に思うの上海香港シンガポールでなく、旧友Tedの家。

線は台湾投資移民時代から—トロントキャンパス、十数年友情、Joey、信義区ビールレストラン、未 finish のビールの前へ。

カナダキャンパスから台北信義ビールテーブル。時空半周、あの夜目の前で最後の一歩。

時に運命の傍観者と思い、後に運命のノードと気づく。ノードは整代台湾人が子・知識・熱意・善意を世界隅々に撒いたから。

十、八年后今やっていること

八年。

@cz_binance 三人の熱情ある大学生を覚え、あの夜を『币安人生』に書いてくれて感謝。

あの夜教えてくれたのは当時意識以上：方向を見る勇気、化繁為简の纪律、冷静の哲学、そして永遠に期限切れない「毎日オーディオブックを聞けばいい」。

あの夜食卓で真剣に：DEXのためUSDTと共に育つチェーン。

あなたは币安チェーンBSC DEX一路2026 DEX最熱へ。

私は別枝へ。

今日 t402 オープンソースプロトコル—任意Webエンドポイントが HTTP 402 Payment Required、クライアントUSDT署名、facilitator链上3秒決済ゼロ协议費。47ネットワーク13チェーン家族 ERC-4337 gasless AI agent自動支払。

八年前「DEXにはどんなチェーン？」今日「ネット全体にどんなUSDT支払レール？」

stablecoinをHTTP底层に、AI agent時代の毎リクエスト3秒自動支払。

方向違う、基因同じ：stablecoinから化繁為简。

当時知らなかったBitcoin OGが後に読み解く。今自分の方法であの夜学んだことを書き続ける。

十一、同桌の人々とその島へ

Joey Ted 当年推荐码冲刺の女子 矿机チップ友へ：

あの夜一緒に時代の始まりを見た。

台湾にも感謝。

2013から成熟BTCコミュニティ；繁中技術文献自由翻訳流通華語世界サービス；2018信義区テーブル空けForbes表紙CEOと大学生100万TPS；半導体基因コミュニティ文化バイリンガル「面白いからやる」純粋熱意。

この島なければあの夜なし。あの夜なければ今日この文なし。
